subject: Fw: Lisa Gassner - Energy Vienna - Att.: Sarah
body:
-----Original Message-----
From: "SKAPA M&T Mark Patzelt" <mark@skapa.at>

Date: Mon, 28 Jan 2008 20:22:38 
To:<kellens@earthlink.net>
Subject: Lisa Gassner - Energy Vienna - Att.: Sarah


Hi Sarah. 
  
My name is Mark and I am a friend of Lisa. I have been in touch with Jeffrey in regards to this new energy technology that is presented in Vienna/Austria. I have sent Jeffrey some information in a couple of emails but have never received any response. 
I have heard that he is currently in Paris and I would like to invite him to come to Vienna. I don’t know though if he is interested at all and don’t want to be a nuisance. 
So, Sarah, please help me and give me a hint about what to do. 
  
Look forward to your reply 
  
Mark 
  
 
  
Mark A. Patzelt 
SKAPA Mining&Trading GmbH 
Rochusgasse 6/2/19 
A - 1030 Wien 
Tel: +43-1-7108585-0, Fax: +43-1-7108585-15 
GSM: +43 699 12001618 
mark@skapa.at 
www.skapa.at

I have heard that he is currently in Paris and I would like to invite him to come to Vienna. I don’t know though if he is interested at all and don’t want to be a nuisance.
